text:
Market today: Oil is the main driver, up 3% on geopolitical fears. This can spill over into tech if it affects sentiment or supply chains, but for now, it's a separate beast.

Your holdings: SOXL is still a big loser (-35%) and flagged for attention. SPAL is also deep in the red (-34%) and flagged. You're concentrated in leveraged tech, so these drawdowns hurt extra.

Watch: The scanner has a few names with high scores, but nothing screams 'buy me now' without more context.

Bottom line: Manage your big losers and watch for clearer signals in tech.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming exposure given the -35% PnL and decay risk, especially on margin.
SPAL: Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF is down significantly (-34%). Reassess risk here.
No new buys today - hold and watch
